models.title: Models
models.empty: No models yet. Start by training one.
models.deleteConfirm: Delete this model and all its data?

model.retryHint: Reuses songs already downloaded on the worker; only re-runs isolation onward.
model.checkpointsHint: Click any saved epoch to make it the active checkpoint for new covers. Per-cover override still wins.
model.stopConfirm: Pause training? Saved checkpoints (every 25 epochs) are preserved — clicking Retry resumes from the last save.
model.stopped: Training paused. Click Retry to resume.
model.resumeHint: Resume picks up from the last saved checkpoint.

train.title: Train a new model
train.subtitle: Provide a name, slug, and a list of song URLs to learn from.
train.slugHint: URL-safe identifier. Auto-generated from the display name.
train.songUrlsHint: One per line. Direct audio links (mp3/wav) or YouTube/SoundCloud URLs.
train.advancedHint: Override worker defaults for this run only.
train.totalEpochHint: Auto scales to dataset size (3 songs → 500, 8 songs → 350, etc.). Set Value lets you pick a specific number; 500 is the safe default.
train.vocoderHint: RefineGAN is newer and often clearer; HiFi-GAN is the classic RVC choice.
train.twoPassIsolationHint: Adds a karaoke-cleanup pass to strip residual instruments. Off by default — pass 2 also strips vocal character (breath, harmonies) which usually hurts training quality.
train.trimSilenceHint: Removes long silent gaps from the isolated vocal. Off by default — aggressive trimming can produce 'spliced' sounding training data.
train.cutPreprocessHint: How Applio chunks audio before training. Automatic is the smart default; Skip and Simple are simpler/faster but less precise.

cover.title: Generate a cover
cover.subtitle: Pick a trained voice and paste the song you want it to sing.
cover.pitchHint: Negative for lower voices, positive for higher. 0 keeps the original key.
cover.advancedHint: Inference knobs. Reset to defaults if unsure.
cover.indexRateHint: How much of the trained singer's 'personality' is applied. Higher = more character but stiffer phrasing. 0.5–0.7 works well for most models.
cover.protectHint: How much of the original is kept on breaths/silence/consonants. Higher reduces 'wind/babble' artefacts but slightly muddies consonants.
cover.skipIsolationHint: Skip the vocal/instrumental separation step. Output will be the converted vocal alone (no remix with original instrumental).
cover.epochHint: Pick a particular saved epoch instead of the auto-detected best. Useful when comparing checkpoints.

recorder.title: Record audio
recorder.deniedHint: Allow microphone access in your browser, then try again.
recorder.hint: Tap to record up to {max} minutes.
